paranoia_debut.title: The Road
paranoia_debut.text:
You've been traveling for several days.

The four found a rhythm.

Aryn in mind.
Ikar's watching the back.
Taera who stops to touch the land at every village crossed.
Vael disappears and reappears without warning.

And you.

You're walking.

You look at your black blade.

It absorbs sunlight.

In the villages there is a distance.
We whisper.
We look at you like you're already the disaster.

observer_quatre.title: Observers
observer_quatre.text:
They work well together.

Too good.

Things they do without talking to each other.
Eyes that mean something you don't understand.

Twelve years together.

You've known them a few days.

Aryn says the right things.
Taera smiles at the right time.
Vael makes jokes.
Ikar... Ikar often looks at your blade.

Not long.

Just a second.

Then he turns away his eyes.

regarder_lame.title: The Black Blade
regarder_lame.text:
It's cold in your hand.

Even in the sun.

You remember how she appeared.

In the ashes of Cendral.
Like she's waiting for you.

Like it's all planned.

Prophecy.
The village.
The four who arrive at the right time.

Too well calculated to be a coincidence.

Or.

You're shaking your head.

You put those thoughts away.

For now.

premier_village.title: The Village of Maren
premier_village.text:
The village is called Maren.

Kid.
Clean.
Ordinary.

Like Cendral.

The locals are watching you come in.

They see the four first.

The Four Blades.
Aerith's defenders.

Some bow.

Then they see you.

And the black blade.

Silence is changing in nature.

An old woman shoots her child behind her.

A man closes his door.

Taera puts her hand on your shoulder.

**"Ignore them. *

Easy to say.

vieille_femme_village.title: The Eye
vieille_femme_village.text:
She holds her child against her.

She's not leaving you.

No anger.

Just fear.

The kind of fear we have in front of something
We can't control it.

Fire.
A storm.
A Chaos porter.

You want to tell him you don't want to hurt.

But Cendral is behind you.

And the words were stuck in your throat
Since Marek looked at you like that.

taverne.title: The Tavern
taverne.text:
The tavern is hot.

It smells like beer and wood.

All four are moving in.

Taera orders for everyone.
Vael makes the tavern laugh.
Aryn looks at the map.
Ikar drinks without talking.

We're serving you.

Except you.

The tavern puts the bowls in front of everyone.

Then he looks at you.

Then he leaves without asking anything in front of you.

Vael pushes his bowl towards you without a word.

You're not taking it.

prendre_bol.title: The Bol
prendre_bol.text:
You take it.

Vael pretends he didn't notice.

Neither is Aryn.

Taera smiles in her soup.

Ikar looks outside.

We eat in silence.

This is the first meal since Cendral
where you don't feel
to be separated from them by something invisible.

Just for a meal.

Then Ikar said:

**"We're leaving tomorrow at dawn. *
**"We must continue training. *

The moment is closing.

dehors_taverne.title: Out
dehors_taverne.text:
The night falls on Maren.

You walk alone on the street.

Houses go away one by one.

Somewhere in the village
A dog barks.

It stops when you come by.

Even the dogs.

You sit on a wall.

The black blade in your hands.

Cold.
Still cold.

premiere_dispute.title: Voices
premiere_dispute.narrator: You hear their voices from the tavern.
premiere_dispute.text:
The window is closed.

Voices.

Ikar first.

**"...we can't wait indefinitely..."**

Aryn answers him.
Too low.

**"...the elders were right..."**

The word "old" comes out clearly.

Then Taera.

**"...but if we make the same mistake as..."**

Vael says something.
Everybody stop.

Then Ikar again.

**"...you have to be ready for everything. *

You know that phrase.

You heard her in the ruins of Cendral.

You don't know the rest of the conversation.

But you know that phrase.

ecouter_plus.title: Listen again
ecouter_plus.text:
You're approaching the window.

Aryn's talking now.

**"...no right to..."**

Ikar cuts.

**"...if the Chaos takes over..."**

** "...that's not what's going to happen..."** says Taera.

**"You can't know that. Ikar.

Quiet.

Vael says something sweet.
You don't hear the words.

But you hear the tone.

The tone of someone trying to calm down.

**"...we must trust him..."** says Aryn.

**"What if we're wrong? "** says Ikar.

New silence.

Long.

Nobody answers.

lendemain_maren.title: The Lendemain
lendemain_maren.text:
We're leaving at dawn.

As planned.

Ikar in the lead today.

You're walking next to Taera.

She's not talking right now.

Then:

**"Did you sleep well? *

**"Yes. *

You're lying.

She knows that.

She's not saying anything.

The road continues.

In your head the sentences turn.

* Ready for anything. *
If the Chaos takes over. *
What if we're wrong? *

Pieces of a puzzle you don't have the full picture of.

demander_taera.title: The Question
demander_taera.text:
**"I heard your conversation last night. *

Taera stops.

**"What did you hear? *

**"Ikar says you have to be ready for anything. *
**"And questions about if we're wrong. *

She's back on her walk.

**"The conversation was about how to help you. *
**"Not about anything else. *

**"What if you can't figure out how to help me? *

She's thinking a long time.

**"Then we're still looking. *

**"That's it? *

**"It's already a lot. *

She's not lying.

You feel it.

But you also know that she doesn't say everything.

semaines_route.title: Weeks
semaines_route.text:
They're training you.

Aryn teaches you how to channel.
Taera teaches you how to anchor.
Vael teaches you how to disperse.

Ikar teaches you how to hit.

He's the quickest mover with you.

Two blades that understand.

But the nights are long.

And the sentences come back.

* Ready for anything. *

Every morning you wake up and watch them sleep.

Four familiar faces.

Four people hiding something from you.

entrainement_scene.title: Training
entrainement_scene.text:
Aryn shows you something.

**"Concentrate not on what you want to destroy. *
**"Concentrate on what you want to protect. *

**"It's the same. *

**"No."** she says.
**"It's exactly not the same. *

You're trying.

The black blade vibrates differently.

Less chaos.
More... direction.

Aryn nods his head.

**"You see. *

For the first time since Cendral —

See.

observer_ikar.title: Watch Ikar
observer_ikar.text:
Ikar sleeps with her blade at hand.

Everybody does that.

But Ikar holds her differently.

Like someone getting ready.

Not an outside attack.

To a decision.

You look at his hand on the handle.

You're thinking about the night in Cendral.

Conversation scraps.

* Ready for anything. *

Has he decided yet?

Do the others know?

The question remains unanswered until morning.

deuxieme_dispute.title: The Second Night
deuxieme_dispute.text:
You can still hear them.

This time more distinctly.

Ikar and Aryn.

**"...it's not progressing fast enough..."** Ikar.

**"...it takes the time it takes..."** Aryn.

**"...the elders said we must be ready to act before..."**

**" The elders also said not to reproduce the same mistakes. *

**"The same mistakes were to wait too long. *

** "No."** Aryn — his voice changes.
**"The same mistakes were not to trust him. *
**"Not to reach out. *
**"That's what killed all four of the time. *

**"What if this time it's different? *

**"It's no different. *

**"Aryn. *

**"That's. Not. Different. *

Quiet.

entrer_camp.title: Enter
entrer_camp.text:
You enter the light of fire.

They stop.

Ikar and Aryn look at each other.

**"You weren't sleeping. * says Vael from his side.

**"No. *

Quiet.

**"What you said..."** you start.

Aryn interrupts you.

**"We were talking about training strategy. *

**"No, you were talking about me. *

Nobody answers.

This silence confirms more than any answer.

rester_obscurite.title: In the Shadow
rester_obscurite.text:
You stay here.

In the dark.

The black blade in your hands.

Cold.

The same mistakes. *
* Hands out. *
It's no different. *

The sentences come together differently depending on how they are read.

In a sense — Aryn defends the player.

In the other — they have a plan.
A plan you don't know.
A plan you're the subject of.

The blade vibrates slightly.

Like she hears too.

Like she understands too.

vieux_apparait.title: The Old Man
vieux_apparait.narrator: He's here when you wake up.
vieux_apparait.text:
An old man.

Sitting on a rock by the roadside.

He hasn't seen you yet.

He sculpts something in a piece of wood.

Like Marek.

He looks up when you approach.

He sees your black blade.

He's not going back.

He smiles.

**"Ah," he simply said.
**"I was waiting for you. *

Not like a threat.

Like someone who waited a long time
And who is relieved that the wait is over.

vieux_avec_quatre.title: With the Four
vieux_avec_quatre.text:
You call the four.

They're coming.

The old man looks at them.

He doesn't change his expression.

Ikar's got his blade.

**"Who are you?** asks Aryn.

**"Someone who knows things. *
**"On the Chaos. *
**"On prophecy. *
**"What we're hiding from you. *

He's looking at you.

Not the four.

You.

**"Not everything is said in front of everyone. *

Ikar is taking a step.

Taera put her hand on her arm.

**"Let him speak. *

Vael is looking at you.

He's not smiling.

vieux_identite.title: Erevane
vieux_identite.text:
*"My name is Erevane. *

He's putting his knife away.

**"I have studied Chaos all my life. *
**"Not in the Order's archives. *
**"In real archives. *
**"The ancients. *
**"The ones they didn't burn. *

**« Burned? *

**"The Order keeps what suits them. *
**"And forget the rest. *

He pulls an old book out of his bag.

Aborted.
Black cover.

**"There is another prophecy. *
**« Older than the one you know. *

He's giving you the book.

**"Chaos is not a curse. *
**"It's a gift. *
**"Ununderstood. *
**"Truly taught. *
**"For three hundred years. *

vieux_pourquoi.title: The Question
vieux_pourquoi.text:
Erevane is looking at you.

**"Because you need to hear it. *

**"What about the four? *

He hesitates.

Just a second.

**"The four are formed by the Order. *
**"The Order has its certainties. *
**"His certainty has been there for three hundred years. *

**"What does that mean? *

**"It means they help you the way they do. *
**"Not necessarily as you need. *

He puts the book on the rock between you.

**"I'm not asking you to leave them. *
**"I'm just asking you to read. *

vieux_livre.title: The Other Prophety
vieux_livre.text:
You take the book.

It opens on a marked page.

A prophecy.
Different.

"The Chaos porter will come from the borders. *
His blade will absorb the light. *
*And in this absorbed light—*
*he will keep what the world has forgotten to keep. *
It's not the end. *
It's memory." *

You're watching Erevane.

**"Who wrote this? *

**"Someone who saw Caël before he tipped. *
**"Someone who thought we could have done otherwise. *

**"Why isn't the Order talking about this? *

He's taking over the book.

**"Because it calls into question everything they've built. *

He's packing the book.

**"I will be in the next city. *
**"If you want to know more. *

He's getting up.
He's going back on the road.

Like he had all his time.

apres_vieux.title: After
apres_vieux.text:
All four are coming.

Or are there from the beginning.

You don't know anymore.

**"Who was that?"** asks Vael.

**"Someone passing by. *

Aryn's looking at you.

His eyes go to the rock where the old man was sitting.

She's not saying anything.

Ikar looks at the road in the direction he left.

**"We continue.** he said.

You keep going.

But something has changed.

Not them.

You.

tension_monte.title: Tension
tension_monte.text:
You're looking for signs.

In their eyes.
In their silences.
In the way Ikar lays his hand near his blade.

Sometimes there's nothing.

Sometimes you're not sure.

One night Aryn sits next to you.

**"You okay? *

**"Yes. *

*"You sleep longer. *

**"I sleep. *

**"You don't sleep like you used to. *

You look at her.

**"How do you know how I slept before? *

She doesn't have an answer to that.

She leaves without saying anything.

The next morning Vael made a joke.

Nobody really laughs.

parler_vael.title: Vael
parler_vael.text:
You sit next to him.

He doesn't say anything for a while.

It's rare for Vael.

**"You met someone on the road. * he says.

**"Someone passing by. *

**"Yeah. *

He's watching the fire.

**"You know what I find interesting? *

**"What. *

**"People who arrive at the right time. *
**"When you're alone. *
**"When looking for answers. *
**"And who have exactly the answers we are looking for. *

**"So what? *

**"And then nothing. *
**"I find it interesting. *

He's getting up.

**"Good night. *

retrouver_vieux.title: Find Erevane
retrouver_vieux.text:
You find him in the tavern of the next city.

Like he said.

He sees you coming in.

He's pushing a chair towards you.

**"Did you read? *

**"Yes. *

**« Questions? *

**"A lot. *

He smiles.

A teacher's kind of smile
Who was exactly waiting for that.

**"Good. *
**"That's how it starts. *

He comes out of other books.

Other pages marked.

You talk a long time.

He listens as much as he talks.

He never says you should leave the four. *

But at the end of the conversation
You realize you didn't mention them.
Only in the past.

lame_nuit.title: The Night of the Blade
lame_nuit.text:
The black blade is in front of you.

It absorbs light from the fire.

You've been watching her for an hour.

Yerevane's sentences.
The fights you heard.
Ikar's eyes.
Aryn's silence.

* Ready for anything. *
The same mistakes. *
If the Chaos takes over. *

And the prophecy of the book.

It's not the end. *
It's memory. *

Two prophecies.
Two readings of the world.

You have to choose which one to believe.

You hear someone moving.

ikar_lame_gorge.title: The Blade
ikar_lame_gorge.text:
You feel her before you see her.

Heat.

Ikar's burning blade.

Under your throat.

You didn't move.

You didn't have time.

Or you didn't want to.

You open your eyes.

Ikar's here.

Knee.

His blade under your throat.

His eyes.

Not anger.

Something much more difficult.

He's shaking slightly.

The blade trembles with him.

ikar_lache.title: He can't
ikar_lache.text:
Ikar don't move.

His blade doesn't move.

But he doesn't do anything.

Second.

Long.

**"Do it. * you say.

Your own voice surprises you.

Calm down.

**"If that's what you have to do. *
**"Do it. *

Ikar closes his eyes.

His blade is extinguishing.

He takes his hand off.

He's staying here.
Head down.

**"I couldn't. *

Not tell you.

To himself.

autres_arrivent.title: Other
autres_arrivent.text:
Aryn's here.

Taera, too.

Vael in the shadows.

They saw.

Or heard.

Aryn kneels in front of Ikar.

She talks to him low.

You don't hear.

Taera is looking at you.

Her eyes shine in the dark.

**"You okay? *

**"Yes. *

Vael is next to you now.

He's not saying anything.

But he's here.

Ikar's getting up.

He's looking at you.

**"I'm sorry. *

Two words.

The toughest you've ever heard of.

confrontation_finale.title: Truth
confrontation_finale.narrator: The fire went out. The dawn is coming.
confrontation_finale.text:
You're sitting all five.

For the first time since Cendral —
Nobody pretends.

Aryn's talking.

**"The spirits told us to be ready for anything. *
**"Ikar understood it as..."**
**"...the ultimate option. *

**"What about you? You're asking.

**"I understood that we must not reproduce Caël. *
**"Caël was alone. *
**"We're not here to watch you. *
**"We're here so you're not alone. *

Ikar looks at the ground.

**"I thought if it got too dangerous..."**

**"No."** says Taera.
**"That was not what to do. *

**"I know now. *

Vael looks at the sky rising.

**"Beautiful way to start the day. *

Nobody laughs.

But Taera sketched a smile.

choix_final.title: The Carrefour
choix_final.text:
The sun is rising.

The four are looking at you.

Your black blade absorbs the morning light.

Ikar. Aryn, Taera. Vael.

Four faces waiting.

Erevane somewhere on the road.
Another prophecy in your head.

Cendral smoke.
The blade under your throat.
Apologies.
The doubts.

It's all there.

And time passes.

choices.text: Trust them. Go to the end together.
Find Erevane. Maybe he was right.

chemin_fuite.title: The Leak
chemin_fuite.text: You turn your back and leave.

chemin_manipulation.title: Erevane
chemin_manipulation.text: You're going to find the old man.
